description: The two lines representing Male and Female mortality rates are colored in vermillion/orange-red (#D55E00) and green (#009E73), which appear clearly distinct to people with normal color vision. However, for individuals with deuteranopia (red-green color blindness), both colors collapse into similar brownish/olive tones, making it nearly impossible to distinguish which line represents males versus females — a critical distinction for interpreting the chart's message about sex-based mortality differences.
